blog.title: Blog
blog.description: News and engineering stories from the Scalar team on OpenAPI, API documentation, and developer experience.

/blog/posts/2026-04-11-oss-pledge.title: Scalar's 2025 Open Source Pledge
/blog/posts/2026-04-11-oss-pledge.description: Scalar renews its Open Source Pledge for 2025, continuing to fund the open source maintainers we depend on.

/blog/posts/2026-03-25-scalar-mcp-oauth.title: Too Long; Didn't Read; Used MCP
/blog/posts/2026-03-25-scalar-mcp-oauth.description: How OAuth works with Scalar MCP servers: authenticate agents against your API with delegated user permissions.

/blog/posts/2026-03-17-agent-mcp.title: Use your API in Cursor
/blog/posts/2026-03-17-agent-mcp.description: Expose your OpenAPI document as an MCP server and use your API directly in Cursor or any MCP-compatible tool.

/blog/posts/2026-03-05-agent-scalar.title: Introducing Agent
/blog/posts/2026-03-05-agent-scalar.description: Introducing Scalar Agent: connect LLMs to your API using a fraction of the context window instead of pasting your whole OpenAPI document.

/blog/posts/2025-08-19-how-to-set-up-an-.title: How to set up an OpenAPI mock server
/blog/posts/2025-08-19-how-to-set-up-an-.description: How to set up an OpenAPI mock server with the Scalar CLI in a few commands.

/blog/posts/2025-07-07-how-to-do-openapi.title: How to do OpenAPI validation (and why it matters)
/blog/posts/2025-07-07-how-to-do-openapi.description: How to validate OpenAPI documents with the Scalar CLI, and why validation matters for your API workflow.

/blog/posts/2025-05-28-how-we-created-an.title: How we created an animated, responsive README
/blog/posts/2025-05-28-how-we-created-an.description: How we built an animated, responsive README for the Scalar GitHub repository with GitHub-flavored Markdown.

/blog/posts/2025-05-07-how-scalar-themes.title: How Scalar themes work
/blog/posts/2025-05-07-how-scalar-themes.description: How Scalar themes work: the CSS variable system that lets you restyle an entire API reference.

/blog/posts/2025-04-28-how-cloudinarys-a.title: How Cloudinary’s API docs create a great developer experience
/blog/posts/2025-04-28-how-cloudinarys-a.description: What Cloudinary API docs get right, and what API-first companies can learn from their developer experience.

/blog/posts/2025-04-23-an-introduction-t.title: An introduction to OpenAPI variables
/blog/posts/2025-04-23-an-introduction-t.description: An introduction to OpenAPI variables: the different types and how to use them in your API documentation.

/blog/posts/2025-04-06-how-we-extended-t.title: How we extended the OpenAPI specification
/blog/posts/2025-04-06-how-we-extended-t.description: The extensions we added to the OpenAPI specification and how we process them under the hood.

/blog/posts/2025-03-26-a-guide-to-openap.title: A guide to OpenAPI security (and how we handle it in Scalar)
/blog/posts/2025-03-26-a-guide-to-openap.description: A practical guide to defining authentication and authorization in OpenAPI, and how Scalar renders security schemes.

/blog/posts/2025-03-19-the-hidden-comple.title: The hidden complexity of building drag and drop
/blog/posts/2025-03-19-the-hidden-comple.description: Why drag and drop is deceptively hard to build, and how we implemented it in the Scalar API Client.

/blog/posts/2025-03-12-how-we-sped-up-ou.title: How we sped up our API docs 25x
/blog/posts/2025-03-12-how-we-sped-up-ou.description: The structural and rendering changes that made our API documentation 25x faster.

/blog/posts/2025-03-05-how-net-9-and-sca.title: How .NET 9 and Scalar solve the problem of under-documented APIs
/blog/posts/2025-03-05-how-net-9-and-sca.description: How .NET 9 OpenAPI document generation and Scalar work together to keep your APIs documented.

/blog/posts/2024-09-01-oss-pledge.title: Scalar Joins the Open-Source Pledge
/blog/posts/2024-09-01-oss-pledge.description: Scalar joins the Open Source Pledge, committing at least $2,000 per developer per year to open source maintainers.
